title: Hickory Shooting: One Dead, Two Injured
summary: A shooting in Hickory left one dead and two injured. A suspect is in custody charged with murder and attempted murder.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in the region and the immediate consequences for the community.

title: Weekend Warmth Followed by Storm Risk
summary: Expect warm temperatures this weekend before a cool down and potential storms arrive next week.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast impacting weekend plans and preparedness for potential severe weather.

title: Government Shutdown: Airport Wait Times May Increase
summary: A partial government shutdown could lead to longer TSA wait times at Charlotte airport. Passengers should arrive early.
charlotte_impact: Informs travelers about potential disruptions due to the government shutdown and advises proactive measures.

title: Fatal Hit-and-Run: Police Seek Driver
summary: A 23-year-old woman was killed in a hit-and-run in Charlotte. Police are seeking the driver who fled on foot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a tragic incident and the urgent need for public assistance in identifying the responsible party.

title: Pedestrian Critically Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized with life-threatening injuries after a crash on South Tryon Street.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about pedestrian safety in the area and the severity of traffic-related incidents.

title: Shooting Near Loyalty Inn: Residents Demand Closure
summary: Two people were shot near the Loyalty Inn in west Charlotte, marking the fifth violent incident this year. Residents are calling for the hotel to close.
charlotte_impact: Highlights ongoing safety concerns in the area and community demands for action to address the violence.

title: North Carolina Faces Growing Wildfire Threat
summary: Fire leaders warn that North Carolina faces a growing wildfire threat due to rising fire numbers and hurricane damage.
charlotte_impact: Alerts the public to the increasing risk of wildfires and the challenges faced by fire crews.

title: Challenge Launched for I-77 South Alternatives
summary: Sustain Charlotte launches a public challenge for I-77 South alternatives due to its impact on greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about infrastructure projects and their environmental impact on local green spaces.

title: New Traffic Signal Planned Near Fort Mill School
summary: A new traffic light is planned in the Catawba Ridge High School area to address safety concerns.
charlotte_impact: Improves safety for students and drivers in a high-traffic area near a school.

title: Two Drivers Killed in Lancaster Head-On Crash
summary: Two drivers were killed in a head-on crash on Airport Road near Golf Course Road in Lancaster.
charlotte_impact: Reports a fatal traffic accident and underscores the importance of road safety.

title: NC Adults Can Now Take Road Tests at Private Schools
summary: North Carolina adults can now take driver's license road tests at certified private schools, reducing wait times.
charlotte_impact: Offers a more convenient option for obtaining a driver's license and reduces NCDMV wait times.

title: Lancaster Police Seek Missing Teen
summary: Lancaster Police are seeking a missing 15-year-old girl possibly taken by a non-custodial parent.
charlotte_impact: Requests public assistance in locating a missing teenager and ensuring her safe return.

title: Man Charged in Hit-and-Run Near School Bus Stop
summary: A man faces charges after allegedly failing to stop for a school bus and injuring a 7-year-old boy.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving near school bus stops and the consequences for offenders.

title: Waxhaw Police Investigate Murder-Suicide
summary: Waxhaw police are investigating an apparent murder-suicide. Detectives believe it is an isolated incident.
charlotte_impact: Reports a tragic event and assures the public that there is no ongoing threat.

title: Reward Offered for Missing Anson County Teen
summary: Anson County authorities are offering a reward for the safe return of a missing 19-year-old last seen in Morven.
charlotte_impact: Seeks public help in finding a missing young adult and ensuring her safety.
